text_original: Brothers and sisters this app surely is the best! If you don't have money for subscription, use it in the free mode. I like it bcz it meets everyone's levels. And the characters,... Download it and see for yourself!
text_zh: 兄弟姐妹们，这款应用绝对是最棒的！如果你没有钱订阅，就用免费模式。我喜欢它是因为它能满足每个人的需求水平。还有那些角色……下载下来亲自看看吧！
reply_original:
Wow, thank you so much for such an incredible review! We are thrilled to hear that you're enjoying Fantasia and that our characters have made such an impression on you. 

It's our goal to make sure everyone can find a connection here, whether they are using the free mode or VIP. Your support truly fuels our team's passion to keep improving!
reply_zh:
哇，非常感谢您如此精彩的评价！听到您喜欢 Fantasia，并且我们的角色给您留下了深刻印象，我们感到非常激动。

我们的目标是确保每个人都能在这里找到共鸣，无论是在使用免费模式还是 VIP 模式。您的支持确实激励着我们团队不断改进的热情！
